channel.title: RankFrame SEO Blog
channel.description: Technical SEO playbooks, architecture audits, and Google Trust building insights for small businesses.

item.title: GEO in 2026: How to Get Your Website Cited by ChatGPT, Claude, and Perplexity
item.description: Generative Engine Optimization is the new SEO. The 8-step playbook for making small-business sites citation-ready for ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews.

item.title: The Small Business SEO Architecture Playbook: 5 Technical Fixes Google Actually Rewards in 2026
item.description: If your website isn't ranking, the problem usually isn't your content — it's your architecture. This playbook walks through the five technical fixes that unlock organic visibility, with real numbers from a $200K+/month audit.

item.title: Why Most Small Business Websites Are Invisible to Google — And the 5 Architecture Fixes That Change Everything
item.description: Most small business sites lose rankings not because of content but because Google's crawler can't parse their architecture. Here are the 5 fixes that move the needle.
